title: Colourful trees stone and water
description: Adds colors for trees, bricks, stone, water, and many more blocks; dye in world and use the colourless variant
body:
New and improved textures added in v1.1.0 by MarioLuigi7896 to better match mojang dye item pallette, so pictures are outdated

 

 
Adds blocks of all 16 colours in minecraft plus one "colourless" block to make 17. 

 
 

Grow Saplings!

 ![grow](https://i.imgur.com/BOXFzXd.gif)

 

All blocks are dye-able in world, just place one of the blocks from the mod, and use dye on it.

 

Sneak while dye-ing blocks to do multi-block areas.  Config file can disable these actions, see example at https://github.com/Lothrazar/ColouredStuff/tree/trunk/1.20/examples

 

https://i.imgur.com/mADjjJK.gif


 

Bricks!

Sandstone!

 

Stairs, slabs, walls, fences, and fence gates!


See Images tab for more

 

Depends on FLIB https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flib
